name: Is COVID from work considered a work illness in Boise Idaho?
description: Yes, if workplace exposure caused it.[7]

mainEntity.name: Is COVID from work considered a work illness in Boise Idaho?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, if workplace exposure caused it.[7]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, if contracted due to workplace exposure, like coworker illness.[7] Idaho courts recognize occupational COVID claims.[7] Key factors: (1) workplace outbreak link; (2) no personal exposure; (3) medical confirmation. File promptly with exposure timeline. Evidence like tests strengthens. Viable if proven job-related.
